name: mythosforge-3d
description: Convert an image into a 3D model (GLB) via Replicate. Bring your own REPLICATE_API_TOKEN. No wallet, no payment.

image.note: path or URL to the source image

image-mode.note: how the image is passed for an unmapped --model (trellis=array, hunyuan=single)

output-key.note: named output key holding the GLB uri for an unmapped --model (trellis=model_file, hunyuan=mesh)

output: JSON line on stdout: { ok, image, model, path, bytes }. Read `path` for the written .glb.

runtimes.tool-use-llm: hand tool-schema.json (openai or anthropic block) to the model; host runs invoke on the tool call. Works with OpenAI, Anthropic, Bankr LLM Gateway, Surplus, and any function-calling model.
